title: FilterByScopeBox
description:
FilterByScopeBox: IRequest that filters all Revit elements that intersect or are contained in a Scope Box with the given name.
In case of combining this request with FilterByLink, the Scope Box will be sought for in both link document as well as the host document.

BoxName.description: Name of the Revit Scope Box to be used as a geometrical filter.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
